attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT AS BK_SHIPSET_NUM_INT,
NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
NSLSDD.SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY AS SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY,
COALESCE(SSED.PLANNING_STATUS,'UNKNOWN') AS PLANNING_STATUS_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER  AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
(CASE WHEN NSOSP.BK_SHIPSET_NUM_INT IS NOT NULL OR  NSOSP.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NOT NULL OR   NSOSP.SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE   
FROM            
(SELECT 
SCXDDHS.INTERFACE_HEADER_ID,
SCXDDHS.DELIVERY_ID,
SCXDDHS.ORDER_NUMBER,
SCXDDHS.SHIP_SET_NUMBER,
SCXDDHS.PLANNING_STATUS
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXSCM_DV_DLVEXT_HDR_STG SCXDDHS 
 UNION 
SELECT
ECXDDHS.INTERFACE_HEADER_ID,
ECXDDHS.DELIVERY_ID,
ECXDDHS.ORDER_NUMBER,
ECXDDHS.SHIP_SET_NUMBER,
ECXDDHS.PLANNING_STATUS 
FROM  $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_XXSCM_DV_DLVEXT_HDR_STG ECXDDHS WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'  )SSED
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON SSED.ORDER_NUMBER=NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPSET  NS
ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NS.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND SSED.SHIP_SET_NUMBER=NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_ASSIGNM ECWDA
ON ECWDA.DELIVERY_ID=SSED.DELIVERY_ID  
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_SO_LINE_SHPMNT_DELIVERY_DTL NSLSDD
ON ECWDA.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID=NSLSDD.SK_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_SHIPMENT_PLAN NSOSP
ON NSOSP.BK_SHIPSET_NUM_INT=NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT AND 
NSOSP.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY AND
NSOSP.SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY=NSLSDD.SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY  SSED.DELIVERY_ID,SSED.ORDER_NUMBER,SSED.SHIP_SET_NUMBER,SSED.PLANNING_STATUS  ORDER BY SSED.INTERFACE_HEADER_ID  DESC) = 1

SELECT
SCXDDHS.INTERFACE_HEADER_ID           	,
SCXDDHS.DELIVERY_ID                   	,
SCXDDHS.ORDER_NUMBER                  	,
SCXDDHS.ORDER_RELEASE_NAME            	,
SCXDDHS.ORDER_TYPE                    	,
SCXDDHS.SHIP_SET_NUMBER               	,
SCXDDHS.PROMISE_DATE                  	,
SCXDDHS.REQUEST_DATE                  	,
SCXDDHS.PARTIAL_SHIPMENTS_ALLOWED     	,
SCXDDHS.CUST_PO_NUMBER                	,
SCXDDHS.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER       	,
SCXDDHS.TRANSACTIONAL_CURR_CODE       	,
SCXDDHS.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER       	,
SCXDDHS.SHIP_TO_CUST_NAME             	,
SCXDDHS.SHIP_TO_LOCATION              	,
SCXDDHS.LOCATION                      	,
SCXDDHS.SHIP_TO_ADDRESS               	,
SCXDDHS.SHIP_TO_CITY                  	,
SCXDDHS.SHIP_TO_PROVINCE              	,
SCXDDHS.SHIP_TO_PROVINCE_CODE         	,
SCXDDHS.SHIP_TO_POSTAL_CODE           	,
SCXDDHS.SHIP_TO_COUNTRY               	,
SCXDDHS.SHIP_FROM_LOCATION            	,
SCXDDHS.AGE                           	,
SCXDDHS.BIZ_ENTITY                    	,
SCXDDHS.CCA_FPM_CODE                  	,
SCXDDHS.COLLECT_ACCOUNT               	,
SCXDDHS.CS_TEAM                       	,
SCXDDHS.CSR                           	,
SCXDDHS.EARLY_ACCEPTANCE_DATE         	,
SCXDDHS.FCD_DATE                      	,
SCXDDHS.FOB_CODE                      	,
SCXDDHS.NAMED_PLACE                   	,
SCXDDHS.OCP_PADDING                   	,
SCXDDHS.ORGANIZATION_CODE             	,
SCXDDHS.SERVICE_LEVEL                 	,
SCXDDHS.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE            	,
SCXDDHS.SHIPPING_PREFERENCE           	,
SCXDDHS.SLC_SHIP_DATE                 	,
SCXDDHS.SS_COST_USD                   	,
SCXDDHS.SS_AMOUNT_USD                 	,
SCXDDHS.DUTY_ATTRIBUTE                	,
SCXDDHS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER       	,
SCXDDHS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NAME         	,
SCXDDHS.IN_REPORT                     	,
SCXDDHS.ORDER_INTERFACE_ATTR33        	,
SCXDDHS.OTM_DOMAIN_NAME               	,
SCXDDHS.OTM_TRANSMISSION_NO           	,
SCXDDHS.OTM_TRANSMISSION_STATUS       	,
SCXDDHS.TRANSMISSION_ERROR_MESSAGE    	,
SCXDDHS.OTM_INTERFACE_STATUS          	,
SCXDDHS.ERROR_CODE                    	,
SCXDDHS.ERROR_DESCRIPTION             	,
SCXDDHS.RETRY_COUNT                   	,
SCXDDHS.SHIP_METHOD                   	,
SCXDDHS.PLANNING_STATUS               	,
SCXDDHS.INCO_TERMS                    	,
SCXDDHS.ATTRIBUTE1                    	,
SCXDDHS.ATTRIBUTE2                    	,
SCXDDHS.ATTRIBUTE3                    	,
SCXDDHS.ATTRIBUTE4                    	,
SCXDDHS.ATTRIBUTE5                    	,
SCXDDHS.ATTRIBUTE6                    	,
SCXDDHS.ATTRIBUTE7                    	,
SCXDDHS.ATTRIBUTE8                    	,
SCXDDHS.ATTRIBUTE9                    	,
SCXDDHS.ATTRIBUTE10                   	,
SCXDDHS.ATTRIBUTE11                   	,
SCXDDHS.ATTRIBUTE12                   	,
SCXDDHS.ATTRIBUTE13                   	,
SCXDDHS.ATTRIBUTE14                   	,
SCXDDHS.ATTRIBUTE15                   	,
SCXDDHS.CREATED_BY                    	,
SCXDDHS.CREATION_DATE                 	,
SCXDDHS.LAST_UPDATED_BY               	,
SCXDDHS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              	,
SCXDDHS.PROGRAM_ID                    	,
SCXDDHS.REQUEST_ID                    	,
SCXDDHS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             	,
SCXDDHS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID        	,
SCXDDHS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE           	,
SCXDDHS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY            	,
SCXDDHS.CUST_ACCOUNT_ID               	,
SCXDDHS.LOCATION_ID                   	,
SCXDDHS.NO_CARTONS                    	,
SCXDDHS.EFFECTIVE_PROMISE_DATE        	,
SCXDDHS.HTS_MISSING                   	,
SCXDDHS.VT_CHECK_STATUS               	,
SCXDDHS.PICK_RELEASE_STATUS           	,
SCXDDHS.STATUS_3B18          	,
SCXDDHS.GLOBAL_NAME                   	,
SCXDDHS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE                         ,
SCXDDHS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME                      ,
SCXDDHS.REFRESH_DATETIME                        , 
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXSCM_DV_DLVEXT_HDR_STG  SCXDDHS  
WHERE  NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO,$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPSET  NS
WHERE SCXDDHS.ORDER_NUMBER=NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AND 
SCXDDHS.SHIP_SET_NUMBER=NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT 
AND NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NS.SALES_ORDER_KEY )

OR NOT EXISTS(
SELECT 1 FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_ASSIGNM ECWDA,$$INVFLMTVWDB.N_SO_LINE_SHPMNT_DELIVERY_DTL NSLSDD
WHERE SCXDDHS.DELIVERY_ID=ECWDA.DELIVERY_ID
AND ECWDA.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID=NSLSDD.SK_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID_INT )   	
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY  SCXDDHS.DELIVERY_ID,SCXDDHS.ORDER_NUMBER,SCXDDHS.SHIP_SET_NUMBER,SCXDDHS.PLANNING_STATUS 
 ORDER BY SCXDDHS.INTERFACE_HEADER_ID  DESC) = 1
